verdicts.title: POI 'always anchor' categories (Medical/Pets/Schools/Sports/Transit/Traffic) ignore useAnchorAlways at runtime — pins follow the day pin and Settings lies
verdicts.reasoning: HeroMap.tsx:410-413 shouldForceAnchor returns ONLY STATE.preferences?.poiAnchoring?.[cat.key]==='anchor' with no cat.useAnchorAlways fallback; default poiAnchoring is {} so for the 6 useAnchorAlways:true pills (poiCategories.ts:147-164) it returns false, while Settings.tsx:596-602 applies the fallback — runtime and the documented contract (state.ts:97, types.d.ts:636) genuinely disagree.

verdicts.title: Adding/removing a place to the to-do list from a map InfoWindow does not repaint to-do markers — map diverges from saved state until remount
verdicts.reasoning: todoBtn.onclick (HeroMap.tsx:320-331) calls refresh() which (314-319) only does iw.setContent + re-wire, never repaintTodoMarkers(); the effect deps are [mapRetryTick] (line 873) so emit('state:changed') re-renders React but does not re-run map setup, and repaintTodoMarkers is invoked only at mount (662) and onSelectedDayChange (620).

verdicts.title: Map InfoWindows + search dropdown are hardcoded English — every place bubble and the search UI ignore the active locale
verdicts.reasoning: Literal English confirmed in buildInfoWindowHtml ('View on Google Maps →', to-do button text, HeroMap.tsx:288,302), mapSearch.ts 'No matches.' (105) + _FALLBACK_CAT.label 'Search result' (50), todoMarkers.ts (151,157), dayMarkers.ts 'Trip Hub'/'Day N' (94-96), and MapSearchBar.tsx Clear title/aria (57-58), while the same surface uses t() for the placeholder (51) and poiTooltips — real but cosmetic, P3 not P2.

verdicts.title: Map search dropdown has no combobox/listbox semantics and no keyboard navigation — unusable for keyboard/screen-reader users
verdicts.reasoning: MapSearchBar.tsx is a plain <input> + empty results <div> (no role/aria-expanded/controls/autocomplete/listbox), renderPredictions emits <button class=map-search-row> with no role=option/aria-selected/id (mapSearch.ts:120), and grep for keydown/ArrowDown/role=option/combobox/aria-expanded across both files returned nothing — selection is click-only.

verdicts.title: Selecting a search result that fails getDetails is a silent dead-end — no marker, no error, dropdown already closed
verdicts.reasoning: fetchDetails (mapSearch.ts:178-179) bare-returns on status!==OK||!place with no feedback, and the click handler already ran hideResults() (230) and overwrote the input (229) before calling fetchDetails (231), leaving no UI cue — real but a rare edge for a just-returned prediction, P3.

verdicts.title: Autocomplete predictions can render out of order (stale response overwrites newer) — no request-sequence guard
verdicts.reasoning: The 220ms debounce (mapSearch.ts:193) only limits frequency; the getPlacePredictions callback (210-220) calls renderPredictions with no request-id/token and no check against current searchInput.value, so a slower earlier response landing after a faster later one wins — genuine but low-frequency, P3.

verdicts.title: Places result on the to-do list double-pins on the map — POI/search pin and to-do pin overlap because skipPlaceIds is never passed
verdicts.reasoning: paintTodoMarkers honours skipPlaceIds (todoMarkers.ts:46,189) but the sole caller repaintTodoMarkers (HeroMap.tsx:652-661) never passes it and never collects placesMarkers/searchMarker place_ids, so a place that is both POI/search-pinned and on the to-do list draws two overlapping markers — minor visual, P3.

verdicts.title: Map search bar offers an interactive search box that silently does nothing when the Maps API key is missing/blocked
verdicts.reasoning: index.html:134 loads Maps JS with key={{ google_maps_api_key }} (empty if unset) and wireMapSearchBanner early-returns at mapSearch.ts:67 when AutocompleteService is absent (no listeners attached), yet MapSearchBar.tsx renders the input strip unconditionally with no disabled/hidden state — real but only under a rare misconfig, P3.

verdicts.title: wireMapSearchBanner leaks a document-level click listener on every HeroMap mount (never removed in cleanup)
verdicts.reasoning: mapSearch.ts:246 attaches document.addEventListener('click',…) and returns void with no teardown; HeroMap's cleanup (852-865) only removes the poiTogglesEl listener, so each navigate('home') remount adds another permanent document-level click handler — real leak but the handler is cheap (getElementById + contains), P3.

verdicts.title: Map search + POI use deprecated legacy Places API (AutocompleteService / PlacesService) — future breakage risk
verdicts.reasoning: mapSearch.ts uses new google.maps.places.AutocompleteService() (69) + getDetails (175) and HeroMap.tsx uses new google.maps.places.PlacesService(map) (243) + nearbySearch (467); grep confirms no AutocompleteSuggestion/importLibrary/Place migration exists — these are Google-deprecated legacy classes, still functional so future-risk only, P3.
